title: NATO Reinvents Itself as Europe Faces Its Gravest Security Test
subtitle: With defense spending surging and U.S. commitment wavering, the alliance confronts an existential reckoning.
metaDescription: How NATO is transforming its structure, spending, and strategy amid the Ukraine war's aftermath and shifting U.S. foreign policy in 2025-2026.

title: S&P 500 Faces a Defining Year as Sentiment Wavers in 2026
subtitle: Between tariff uncertainty, Fed policy shifts, and AI-driven euphoria, Wall Street confronts its most complex inflection point in a decade.
metaDescription: Discover what analysts, Fed signals, and geopolitical tensions mean for the S&P 500 in 2026 — and how global investors should position themselves now.
